recent: Input without review is easy to forget.	只有输入没有复习，很容易遗忘。
It is not enough to understand a point once; we must review it repeatedly.	仅仅理解一次某个知识点是不够的；我们必须反复复习。
清晰的计划不仅能节省时间，还能减少焦虑。	A clear plan can not only save time but also reduce anxiety.
Discipline turns short study sessions into meaningful progress.	自律能把短时学习变成有意义的进步。
Persistence is a long-term choice, not a momentary impulse.	坚持不是一时冲动，而是长期选择。
